key_items: Bitcoin falls below $75K with $941M liquidations as Fed rate hike fears resurface
Rising Treasury yields and Kevin Warsh's hawkish stance revive December rate hike expectations
Trump Media transfers 2,650 BTC to exchanges amid $455M losses, signaling potential selling pressure
reasoning: The narrative has shifted from Fed rate-cut optimism to rate-hike concerns, with bond markets pricing in 25bp increases by year-end and Treasury yields rising to 5%. This macroeconomic headwind combined with technical breakdown below $75K, large liquidation cascades, and insider selling (Trump Media) creates a near-term bearish setup that likely pressures price over the next 1-7 days.
risks: Cascading liquidations and forced selling if BTC breaks below $72K support, potentially triggering another 10-15% drawdown as margin positions unwind.
